metadata.description: Customer full name (e.g., Contoso Ltd)
3–5 character customer abbreviation used in resource names (e.g., CON)
Customer Active Directory domain name (e.g., contoso.local)
Primary Azure region for the Landing Zone
Secondary Azure region. Set to "auto" to automatically select the Microsoft-documented paired region for the primary.
Deploy resources into the secondary region. Set to false for primary-only deployments.
Deployment environment
Primary region site ID (101–199 for production). Used as 2nd octet of 10.x.0.0/16 per Espria networking standards.
Secondary region site ID (101–199 for production). Used as 2nd octet of 10.x.0.0/16 per Espria networking standards.
On-premises address prefix used in spoke UDRs (e.g., 10.1.0.0/16)
Sophos XG NVA VM size
Sophos XG Marketplace image version. Use "latest" or a specific version string.
Admin username for all VMs (DCs, management VM)
Admin password for all VMs – must meet Azure complexity requirements (12+ chars, upper, lower, number, symbol)
Domain Controller VM size
Management jump VM size
Team or individual who created this deployment
Team responsible for ongoing management (typically Espria managed service)
Alert notification email address for the Espria managed service NOC
Log Analytics Workspace retention in days
Enable Azure Backup for DC VMs (Recovery Services Vault, Enhanced Policy)
Enable Azure Disk Backup for Sophos XG NVA disks (Backup Vault)
Enable Azure Site Recovery for the Management VM (primary → secondary)
Customer full name (e.g., Contoso)
Customer abbreviation used as MG ID prefix (e.g., CON)
On-premises address prefix (used by downstream modules / future rules).
2nd octet of the 10.x.0.0/16 address space for this region
2nd octet of the 10.x.0.0/16 address space for this region
Number of DC VMs to deploy (2 for primary, 1 for secondary)
AD domain name. Used for DC promotion post-deployment and tagging.

resources.name: [format('{0}-AZ{1}-DC0{2}', variables('custAbbr'), variables('regAbbr'), add(range(0, parameters('dcCount'))[copyIndex()], 1))]

networkInterfaces.id: [resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', format('{0}-AZ{1}-DC0{2}-nic', variables('custAbbr'), variables('regAbbr'), add(range(0, parameters('dcCount'))[range(0, parameters('dcCount'))[copyIndex()]], 1)))]

dependsOn: [resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', format('{0}-AZ{1}-DC0{2}-nic', variables('custAbbr'), variables('regAbbr'), add(range(0, parameters('dcCount'))[range(0, parameters('dcCount'))[copyIndex()]], 1)))]

copy.input: [resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', format('{0}-AZ{1}-DC0{2}', variables('custAbbr'), variables('regAbbr'), add(range(0, parameters('dcCount'))[range(0, parameters('dcCount'))[copyIndex()]], 1)))]

dependsOn: [resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', format('{0}-AZ{1}-DC0{2}-nic', variables('custAbbr'), variables('regAbbr'), add(range(0, parameters('dcCount'))[range(0, parameters('dcCount'))[copyIndex()]], 1)))]

metadata.description: AzureBastionSubnet resource ID from the connectivity VNet. Bastion attaches to the hub VNet subnet to reach all peered spokes. Pass empty string for vWAN variant where Bastion is in the management spoke.
Name of the hub VNet (must already exist in this RG)
Full resource ID of the spoke VNet
Short label for this spoke used in the peering name (e.g. identity, management)
Allow forwarded traffic from the spoke (required for NVA traffic flow)

peeringId.value: [resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/virtualNetworkPeerings', split(format('{0}/link-to-{1}', parameters('hubVnetName'), last(split(parameters('spokeVnetId'), '/'))), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/link-to-{1}', parameters('hubVnetName'), last(split(parameters('spokeVnetId'), '/'))), '/')[1])]

vmInsightsVms.value: [concat(createArray(createObject('id', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('rgPriIdentity')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'deploy-pri-identity'), '2025-04-01').outputs.dcVmIds.value[0], 'location', parameters('primaryRegion')), createObject('id', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('rgPriIdentity')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'deploy-pri-identity'), '2025-04-01').outputs.dcVmIds.value[1], 'location', parameters('primaryRegion'))), createArray(createObject('id', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('rgPriManagement')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'deploy-pri-management'), '2025-04-01').outputs.mgmtVmId.value, 'location', parameters('primaryRegion'))))]

metadata.description: Alert notification email address (Espria managed service)
Log Analytics workspace retention in days (30–730)
Log Analytics workspace SKU

properties.description: VM Insights data collection rule – performance counters and Windows event logs

metadata.description: Primary region – always allowed
Secondary region – always allowed
Log Analytics Workspace resource ID for DINE monitoring policies
Data Collection Rule resource ID for AMA DINE policy

properties.description: Restricts resource deployment to the approved regions defined at Landing Zone deployment time. Enforced as Deny.

nonComplianceMessages.message: [format('Resource deployment is restricted to {0} and {1}. Contact Espria to request a region change.', parameters('primaryRegion'), parameters('secondaryRegion'))]

properties.displayName: [format('[{0}] Allowed VM SKUs – D-series 2/4/8 vCPU', variables('custAbbr'))]
properties.description: Restricts VM deployment to approved D-series and B-series SKUs. Includes 2/4/8 vCPU variants across v4/v5/v6 generations. Contact Espria to request additional SKUs.

nonComplianceMessages.message: The requested VM SKU is not in the approved list. Approved SKUs are D-series 2/4/8 vCPU (v4/v5/v6) and B-series burstable. Contact Espria to request an exception.

properties.displayName: [format('[{0}] Deploy Azure Monitor Agent – Windows VMs', variables('custAbbr'))]
properties.description: Automatically deploys Azure Monitor Agent on Windows VMs and associates them with the central Log Analytics workspace DCR. Ensures all VMs are enrolled in VM Insights.

nonComplianceMessages.message: This VM is not enrolled in VM Insights. Azure Monitor Agent will be deployed automatically by policy remediation.

properties.displayName: [format('[{0}] Configure VM Diagnostic Settings → Central LAW', variables('custAbbr'))]
properties.description: Deploy If Not Exists: configures VM diagnostic settings to forward metrics and logs to the central Log Analytics workspace in the management resource group.

nonComplianceMessages.message: Diagnostic settings are not configured. Policy remediation will configure diagnostics to forward to the central Log Analytics workspace.

properties.displayName: [format('[{0}] Auto-tag: Inherit CreatedBy from Resource Group', variables('custAbbr'))]
properties.description: Automatically applies the CreatedBy tag to resources that are missing it, inheriting the value from the parent resource group. Ensures cost attribution and audit trail across all resources.

nonComplianceMessages.message: Resource is missing the CreatedBy tag. Policy will automatically inherit this tag from the resource group.

properties.displayName: [format('[{0}] Auto-tag: Inherit ManagedBy from Resource Group', variables('custAbbr'))]
properties.description: Automatically applies the ManagedBy tag to resources that are missing it, inheriting from the parent resource group. Identifies Espria as the managing party for billing and operational reporting.

nonComplianceMessages.message: Resource is missing the ManagedBy tag. Policy will automatically inherit this tag from the resource group.

properties.displayName: [format('[{0}] Auto-tag: Inherit Environment from Resource Group', variables('custAbbr'))]
properties.description: Automatically applies the Environment tag (prod/dev/uat) to resources that are missing it, inheriting from the parent resource group. Used in cost management filters and compliance reporting.

nonComplianceMessages.message: Resource is missing the Environment tag. Policy will automatically inherit this tag from the resource group.

properties.displayName: [format('[{0}] Auto-tag: Inherit Customer from Resource Group', variables('custAbbr'))]
properties.description: Automatically applies the Customer tag to resources that are missing it, inheriting from the parent resource group. Required for multi-tenant cost reporting in Espria managed services.

nonComplianceMessages.message: Resource is missing the Customer tag. Policy will automatically inherit this tag from the resource group.

parameters.diskBackupTargets: [if(parameters('deploySecondaryRegion'), createObject('value', createArray(createObject('diskId', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('rgSecConnectivity')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'deploy-sec-connectivity'), '2025-04-01').outputs.nvaOsDiskId.value))), createObject('value', createArray()))]

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}/{2}/{3}', variables('rsvAsrName'), variables('sourceFabricName'), variables('sourceContainerName'), parameters('sourceVmName'))]
dependsOn: [resourceId('Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/replicationFabrics/replicationNetworks/replicationNetworkMappings', split(format('{0}/{1}/azureNetwork/{2}-to-{3}-netmapping', variables('rsvAsrName'), variables('sourceFabricName'), parameters('primaryRegion'), parameters('region')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}/azureNetwork/{2}-to-{3}-netmapping', variables('rsvAsrName'), variables('sourceFabricName'), parameters('primaryRegion'), parameters('region')), '/')[1], split(format('{0}/{1}/azureNetwork/{2}-to-{3}-netmapping', variables('rsvAsrName'), variables('sourceFabricName'), parameters('primaryRegion'), parameters('region')), '/')[2], split(format('{0}/{1}/azureNetwork/{2}-to-{3}-netmapping', variables('rsvAsrName'), variables('sourceFabricName'), parameters('primaryRegion'), parameters('region')), '/')[3])]
